title: USGS Natural Hazards
description: A USGS source card for earthquakes, volcanoes, landslides, coastal change, and other hazards.
license: Public Domain / some linked media may vary

pages.text: USGS natural hazards resources bring together science about earthquakes, volcanoes, landslides, geomagnetic storms, coastal change, and related risks.
Use this source for cross-hazard comparison, scientific modeling, emergency planning discussions, and reading evidence about uncertainty and risk.
USGS government materials are generally public domain, but individual linked photos, datasets, or partner media may require separate review.
